title: Artificial Tulips Flowers 6 Bunches, White Silk Fake Tulips Flowers Bouquet 30pcs Flower Head for Wedding Arrangements Home Garden Decoration
features: MATERIAL: Our tulip simulation bouquet flowers are made of high quality silk material, the leaves and stems are made of plastic, no odour. Each flower head has plastic support in the middle, which makes the flowers look fuller and not easy to deform.

SIZE AND PACKAGING: Each package of our products includes 6 bunches of tulip bouquets with the same colour, each bunch includes 5 tulips. The length of the tulip simulation bouquet is about 40cm, the length of the flower head is about 4cm, the length is suitable for most vases.

EASY TO MAINTAIN: Compared to real flowers, simulated tulip bouquets are brightly coloured, won't wilt and don't require frequent watering and new flowers, making them ideal for people who don't have the time to take care of them and for those with pollen allergies.

APPLICATION SCENARIO: The tulip simulation bouquet can be placed in a vase by itself or paired with other flowers to decorate indoor scenes such as living room, dining room, party, study, office, hotel and so on. Also ideal for wedding decoration, garden and other outdoor venues.

WARM TIPS: Our tulip bouquet is packed in transparent plastic bag, it will be squeezed during transport, the product you receive may be slightly deformed. Just manually adjust each stem and leave it quietly for a while, these flowers will slowly return to their original fullness and vibrancy.
description: Product Description Easy to Take Care of 1.Compared with real flowers, our artificial flowers don't need to be watered or pruned, and keep their colours bright all year round. 2.The leaves of tulip simulation flowers can be adjusted up and down in height, and the branches can be pulled and bent at will, which can be used to meet your different needs. 3.Due to the long shipping time, the flowers may be deformed or fall off, don't worry, just re-install it. High Quality Decorative Artificial Flowers Our tulip artificial flowers are brightly coloured and well made, which can add more elegance and romance to your home as home decoration. You can use our artificial tulip bouquets to decorate indoor spaces such as study, living room, bedroom, dining room, kitchen, balcony and so on, and also can be used in gardens, weddings and other outdoor venues. It is also ideal for gift giving on birthdays, Mother's Day, Christmas and anniversaries. Multiple Application Scenarios With a wide range of artificial flowers, you can DIY any bouquet you want!
